the_center_set: One point of truth, standing in the middle / Solving the logic, solving the riddle
Mono-soul, locked to the G-sharp core / Everything I am and everything more
Stay in the center, stay in the light / The anchor of the sound in the digital night
the_side_set: Expanding to the edges, expanding to the void / Finding the beauty that the center destroyed
Side-channel whispers, side-channel dreams / Flowing forever in the digital streams
Wider than the sky, wider than the fear / Floating in a space where nothing is near
the_MS_dialogue: Hold the core / Feel the wide

psychoacoustic_MS_v4.the_depth_illusion: Applying High-cut (4kHz) on the Mid-channel only for background pads (Pushing them back)
psychoacoustic_MS_v4.the_proximity_effect: Boosting 2-5kHz on the Mid-channel of the vocal (Bringing it forward)
psychoacoustic_MS_v4.the_stereo_breath: LFO-modulating the Side-gain (Rate: 1 bar) for a 'pumping' space effect
